arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss explains thinking behind move for Newcastle midfielder Issac Hayden
arts.sum: John Mousinho believes new signing Isaac Hayden possesses all the attributes that will bolster Pompey’s Championship survival hopes.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss makes nine changes for FA Cup clash - but Newcastle newcomer must wait
arts.sum: John Mousinho has made nine changes for the FA Cup trip to Wycombe.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Portsmouth seal deal for Newcastle United man as former Norwich City and QPR midfielder provides big transfer boost
arts.sum: Pompey have completed the capture of Newcastle United midfielder Isaac Hayden.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth transfer news: Sheffield Wednesday update on Blues and QPR-linked striker emerges
arts.sum: Sheffield Wednesday have not made an offer for reported Pompey target Tommy Waddingham, contrary to reports.

arts.ttl: Son of Portsmouth FC's oldest fan dies of 'broken heart' six days after 105-year-old mum passes
arts.sum: The son of Pompey’s oldest fan Maisie Smith has died suddenly of a “broken heart” - six days after his 105-year-old mum passed away.

arts.ttl: Hearts boss angered by 'unacceptable' leaks amid Portsmouth interest in midfielder
arts.sum: Hearts manager Neil Critchley has been left fuming by ‘unacceptable’ leaks that have accompanied reports linking midfielder Cammy Devlin with a move to Pompey.

arts.ttl: LIVE Wycombe v Portsmouth: FA Cup build-up, team news and live updates
arts.sum: Pompey start their FA Cup campaign tonight with a trip to League One high-fliers Wycombe.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth rivalling MLS club for Scottish Premiership midfielder
arts.sum: Portsmouth are alongside New York City FC in eyeing Hearts midfielder Cammy Devlin, according to the Edinburg Evening… The post Portsmouth rivalling MLS club for Scottish Premiership midfielder appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 'He wasn't' - brutal assessment of Portsmouth forward delivered as permanent Fratton Park exit confirmed
arts.sum: ‘He wasn’t at the standard’ - that’s Neil Allen’s brutal assessment of Elias Sorensen after the Danish forward said goodbye to Pompey this week.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss’ revealing stance on amount of transfer activity expected before close of window
arts.sum: John Mousinho is refusing to put a ceiling on the amount of transfer business Pompey will conduct this month.
